overview: This U/B/G Blue Tempo deck leverages early disruption and efficient threats to control the pace of Vintage games. By holding up mana for Flusterstorm, it denies opponents their key plays while establishing board presence with Psychic Frog. Collector Ouphe provides a resilient stabilizer that generates card advantage, allowing the deck to outlast aggressive strategies and race control opponents.
win_conditions: Outlasting opponents through superior card advantage and disruption
Closing games with efficient, hard-to-remove threats
Disrupting opponent's game plan until they run out of resources

keep_criteria: Hands containing early disruption like Flusterstorm
Hands with Psychic Frog or Collector Ouphe alongside lands
Hands with a clear path to disrupt the opponent's first turn
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking interaction or early threats
Hands with too many lands or too few
Hands without a clear plan to establish tempo

early_game: Play lands and hold up two blue mana for Flusterstorm
Cast Psychic Frog to generate card advantage and apply immediate pressure
Disrupt opponent's early threats or combo pieces
mid_game: Deploy Collector Ouphe to stabilize and gain card advantage
Use removal and counterspells to control the board
Maintain tempo by trading efficiently and keeping the initiative
late_game: Leverage card advantage to outvalue opponents
Use resilient threats to close the game
Maintain interaction to prevent opponent's late-game finishers

key_cards.name: Psychic Frog
key_cards.notes: Cast early to draw cards and apply immediate board presence, often forcing opponent to answer before developing their game plan.

key_cards.name: Collector Ouphe
key_cards.notes: Use to recover from board wipes or aggressive starts, generating value while providing a resilient threat.

key_cards.name: Flusterstorm
key_cards.notes: Hold up two blue mana to counter the first spell cast each turn, protecting your board and denying opponent's key plays.

sequencing_tips: Always prioritize holding up mana for Flusterstorm before committing to other spells
Cast Psychic Frog before playing lands if possible to maximize card draw timing
Use Collector Ouphe after taking damage or losing cards to maximize its value generation

matchups.advice: Use Flusterstorm aggressively to disrupt combo pieces and buy time for your threats.
Prioritize early disruption and use Psychic Frog to generate value while racing.
Apply consistent pressure with threats and use Flusterstorm to protect your board state.
